title: The Fable
description:
Known only as ‘The Fable,’ a legendary hitman feared throughout the criminal underworld is ordered by his boss to live as a normal civilian for one year without killing anyone. Taking on the identity of Akira Satou, he moves to Osaka alongside his partner Yoko and attempts to adapt to an ordinary lifestyle while hiding his deadly skills and past. Although he tries to stay out of trouble, his incredible instincts and combat abilities constantly draw attention from dangerous criminals and underground organizations.

As Akira experiences everyday life for the first time, he slowly begins understanding friendship, kindness, and what it means to live like a normal human being. However, the violent world he left behind continues to follow him, forcing him into conflicts where survival often depends on his assassin instincts. Combining action, dark comedy, suspense, and character drama, The Fable tells a unique story about redemption, self-control, and finding humanity in a life built around violence.
